parsed.tosca_template:
tosca_definitions_version: tosca_simple_yaml_1_3
description: Architecture for deploying a Java application named Alien with an embedded
  Tomcat server on a Linux virtual machine with JDK 17.0.10. The application connects
  to an Elasticsearch instance version 8.12.0 hosted on a separate Linux virtual machine.
  Both virtual machines are connected to the same IPv4 network.
node_types:
  computeWithblocNetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithnetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithblocStorage:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithDatabase:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjStorage:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjBDD:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  StorageForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
    capabilities:
      storage:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Storage
  RuntimeForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Runtime
    capabilities:
      host:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Compute
  NetworkForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.network.Network
    capabilities:
      network:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Network
  ContainerWithDatabase:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Application
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
data_types:
  acme.datatypes.Location:
    derived_from: tosca.datatypes.Root
    description: 'A deployment location: region and/or availability zone.'
    properties:
      region:
        type: string
        required: false
      availability_zone:
        type: string
        required: false
policy_types:
  acme.policies.Placement:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Placement
    description: Geographic placement constraint (region and/or availability zone).
    properties:
      locations:
        type: list
        required: true
        entry_schema:
          type: acme.datatypes.Location
      distribution:
        type: string
        default: multi_region
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - single_region
          - multi_region
  acme.policies.Availability:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Service-level availability target (percent).
    properties:
      availability:
        type: float
        required: true
        constraints:
        - in_range:
          - 0.0
          - 100.0
  acme.policies.Latency:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Maximum tolerated network latency.
    properties:
      max_latency:
        type: scalar-unit.time
        required: true
        constraints:
        - greater_than: 0 ms
  acme.policies.Cost:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Root
    description: Budget constraint over a billing period.
    properties:
      max_cost:
        type: float
        required: true
      currency:
        type: string
        default: USD
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - USD
          - EUR
          - GBP
      period:
        type: string
        default: monthly
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - hourly
          - daily
          - monthly
          - yearly
topology_template:
  node_templates:
    alien_application:
      type: WebApplication
      properties:
        context_root: /alien
      capabilities:
        app_endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: http
            port: 8080
            secure: false
            url_path: /alien
      requirements:
      - host: alien_tomcat_server
      - dependency: elasticsearch_component
    alien_tomcat_server:
      type: WebServer
      requirements:
      - host: alien_vm
    alien_vm:
      type: computeWithnetwork
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: alien_vm
            num_cpus: 3
            mem_size: 4 GB
            disk_size: 20 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: linux
            distribution: ubuntu
            version: '20.04'
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: ssh
            port: 22
            secure: true
      requirements:
      - network_link: common_network
    elasticsearch_component:
      type: SoftwareComponent
      properties:
        component_version: 8.12.0
      requirements:
      - host: elasticsearch_vm
    elasticsearch_vm:
      type: computeWithnetwork
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: elasticsearch_vm
            num_cpus: 3
            mem_size: 2 GB
            disk_size: 10 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: linux
            distribution: ubuntu
            version: '20.04'
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: ssh
            port: 22
            secure: true
      requirements:
      - network_link: common_network
    jdk_alien:
      type: SoftwareComponent
      properties:
        component_version: 17.0.10
      requirements:
      - host: alien_vm
    jdk_elasticsearch:
      type: SoftwareComponent
      properties:
        component_version: 17.0.10
      requirements:
      - host: elasticsearch_vm
    common_network:
      type: Network
      properties:
        ip_version: 4
      capabilities:
        link: {}

tosca_definitions_version: tosca_simple_yaml_1_3
description: Architecture consisting of two compute nodes (VM-A and VM-B) deployed
  in different regions (us-east-1 and eu-west-2 respectively), each with 4 vCPUs,
  8 GB RAM, and Ubuntu 22.04. Both compute nodes are connected to a single L2 network
  named 'lan1' with CIDR 10.0.0.0/24, forming a broadcast domain.
node_types:
  computeWithblocNetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithnetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithblocStorage:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithDatabase:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjStorage:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjBDD:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  StorageForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
    capabilities:
      storage:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Storage
  RuntimeForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Runtime
    capabilities:
      host:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Compute
  NetworkForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.network.Network
    capabilities:
      network:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Network
  ContainerWithDatabase:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Application
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
data_types:
  acme.datatypes.Location:
    derived_from: tosca.datatypes.Root
    description: 'A deployment location: region and/or availability zone.'
    properties:
      region:
        type: string
        required: false
      availability_zone:
        type: string
        required: false
policy_types:
  acme.policies.Placement:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Placement
    description: Geographic placement constraint (region and/or availability zone).
    properties:
      locations:
        type: list
        required: true
        entry_schema:
          type: acme.datatypes.Location
      distribution:
        type: string
        default: multi_region
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - single_region
          - multi_region
  acme.policies.Availability:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Service-level availability target (percent).
    properties:
      availability:
        type: float
        required: true
        constraints:
        - in_range:
          - 0.0
          - 100.0
  acme.policies.Latency:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Maximum tolerated network latency.
    properties:
      max_latency:
        type: scalar-unit.time
        required: true
        constraints:
        - greater_than: 0 ms
  acme.policies.Cost:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Root
    description: Budget constraint over a billing period.
    properties:
      max_cost:
        type: float
        required: true
      currency:
        type: string
        default: USD
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - USD
          - EUR
          - GBP
      period:
        type: string
        default: monthly
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - hourly
          - daily
          - monthly
          - yearly
topology_template:
  node_templates:
    VM_A:
      type: computeWithnetwork
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: VM-A
            num_cpus: 4
            mem_size: 8 GB
        os:
          properties:
            type: Linux
            distribution: Ubuntu
            version: 22.04.0
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        binding: {}
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: tcp
            secure: false
      requirements:
      - network_link: lan1
    VM_B:
      type: computeWithnetwork
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: VM-B
            num_cpus: 4
            mem_size: 8 GB
        os:
          properties:
            type: Linux
            distribution: Ubuntu
            version: 22.04.0
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        binding: {}
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: tcp
            secure: false
      requirements:
      - network_link: lan1
    lan1:
      type: Network
      properties:
        ip_version: 4
      capabilities:
        link: {}
  policies:
  - placement_VM_A:
      type: acme.policies.Placement
      targets:
      - VM_A
      properties:
        locations:
        - region: us-east-1
  - placement_VM_B:
      type: acme.policies.Placement
      targets:
      - VM_B
      properties:
        locations:
        - region: eu-west-2

conflicts.explanation: A single criterion blocks: relaxing it is enough.

relaxations.cible: VM_A (compute) — No cloud provider offers a virtual machine with Ubuntu 22.04 in the requested configuration. Only generic Linux or Windows operating systems are available.
relaxations.action: Switch to a generic Linux operating system: Change the operating system type from 'ubuntu' to 'linux'.
relaxations.explanation: You gain access to real offers for VM-A, but you will need to manually install Ubuntu 22.04 or use a generic Linux distribution provided by the cloud provider.

relaxations.cible: VM_A (compute) — No cloud provider offers a virtual machine with Ubuntu 22.04 in the requested configuration. Only generic Linux or Windows operating systems are available.
relaxations.action: Switch to a Windows operating system: Change the operating system type from 'ubuntu' to 'windows'.
relaxations.explanation: You gain access to real offers for VM-A, but you will be using a Windows environment instead of Ubuntu 22.04, which may require adjustments to your workload.

relaxations.cible: VM_B (compute) — No cloud provider offers a virtual machine with Ubuntu 22.04 in the requested configuration. Only generic Linux or Windows operating systems are available.
relaxations.action: Switch to a generic Linux operating system: Change the operating system type from 'ubuntu' to 'linux'.
relaxations.explanation: You gain access to real offers for VM-B, but you will need to manually install Ubuntu 22.04 or use a generic Linux distribution provided by the cloud provider.

relaxations.cible: VM_B (compute) — No cloud provider offers a virtual machine with Ubuntu 22.04 in the requested configuration. Only generic Linux or Windows operating systems are available.
relaxations.action: Switch to a Windows operating system: Change the operating system type from 'ubuntu' to 'windows'.
relaxations.explanation: You gain access to real offers for VM-B, but you will be using a Windows environment instead of Ubuntu 22.04, which may require adjustments to your workload.

parsed.tosca_template:
tosca_definitions_version: tosca_simple_yaml_1_3
description: Architecture deploying two compute nodes (VM-A in us-east-1 and VM-B
  in eu-west-1) with 4 vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and a generic Linux OS. The nodes are connected
  through a network with a latency requirement of below 200 ms between them.
node_types:
  computeWithblocNetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithnetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithblocStorage:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithDatabase:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjStorage:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjBDD:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  StorageForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
    capabilities:
      storage:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Storage
  RuntimeForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Runtime
    capabilities:
      host:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Compute
  NetworkForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.network.Network
    capabilities:
      network:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Network
  ContainerWithDatabase:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Application
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
data_types:
  acme.datatypes.Location:
    derived_from: tosca.datatypes.Root
    description: 'A deployment location: region and/or availability zone.'
    properties:
      region:
        type: string
        required: false
      availability_zone:
        type: string
        required: false
policy_types:
  acme.policies.Placement:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Placement
    description: Geographic placement constraint (region and/or availability zone).
    properties:
      locations:
        type: list
        required: true
        entry_schema:
          type: acme.datatypes.Location
      distribution:
        type: string
        default: multi_region
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - single_region
          - multi_region
  acme.policies.Availability:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Service-level availability target (percent).
    properties:
      availability:
        type: float
        required: true
        constraints:
        - in_range:
          - 0.0
          - 100.0
  acme.policies.Latency:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Maximum tolerated network latency.
    properties:
      max_latency:
        type: scalar-unit.time
        required: true
        constraints:
        - greater_than: 0 ms
  acme.policies.Cost:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Root
    description: Budget constraint over a billing period.
    properties:
      max_cost:
        type: float
        required: true
      currency:
        type: string
        default: USD
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - USD
          - EUR
          - GBP
      period:
        type: string
        default: monthly
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - hourly
          - daily
          - monthly
          - yearly
topology_template:
  node_templates:
    VM_A:
      type: Compute
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: VM_A
            num_cpus: 4
            mem_size: 8 GB
        os:
          properties:
            type: linux
            version: '22.04'
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: tcp
            secure: false
    VM_B:
      type: Compute
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: VM_B
            num_cpus: 4
            mem_size: 8 GB
        os:
          properties:
            type: linux
            version: '22.04'
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: tcp
            secure: false
    network:
      type: Network
      capabilities:
        link: {}
  policies:
  - placement_vm_a:
      type: acme.policies.Placement
      targets:
      - VM_A
      properties:
        locations:
        - region: us-east-1
  - placement_vm_b:
      type: acme.policies.Placement
      targets:
      - VM_B
      properties:
        locations:
        - region: eu-west-1
  - latency_policy:
      type: acme.policies.Latency
      targets:
      - VM_A
      - VM_B
      properties:
        max_latency: 200 ms

conflicts.explanation: A single criterion blocks: relaxing it is enough.

relaxations.cible: load_balancer (loadbalancer) — No cloud provider offers a load balancer with the 'round-robin' type in the requested configuration.
relaxations.action: Change the load balancer type: Replace the requested 'round-robin' load balancer type with either 'layer4' or 'layer7'.
relaxations.explanation: You gain access to real offers from cloud providers, but the load balancing algorithm will differ from round-robin. 'Layer4' operates at the transport level (TCP/UDP), while 'layer7' operates at the application level (HTTP/HTTPS), which may affect how traffic is distributed to your web instances.

parsed.tosca_template:
tosca_definitions_version: tosca_simple_yaml_1_3
description: Architecture deploying a compute node in the us-east-1 region hosting
  a web component with 4 vCPUs and 8 GB RAM running Ubuntu 22.04. The web component
  scales out to multiple instances under load and is bound to a single fixed IP address
  via a layer7 load balancer.
node_types:
  computeWithblocNetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable

        occurrences:
        - 1

    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  StorageForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
    capabilities:
      storage:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Storage
  RuntimeForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Runtime

data_types:
  acme.datatypes.Location:
    derived_from: tosca.datatypes.Root
    description: 'A deployment location: region and/or availability zone.'
    properties:
      region:
        type: string
        required: false
      availability_zone:
        type: string
        required: false
policy_types:
  acme.policies.Placement:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Placement
    description: Geographic placement constraint (region and/or availability zone).
    properties:
      locations:
        type: list
        required: true
        entry_schema:
          type: acme.datatypes.Location
      distribution:
        type: string
        default: multi_region
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - single_region
          - multi_region
  acme.policies.Availability:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Service-level availability target (percent).
    properties:
      availability:
        type: float
        required: true
        constraints:
        - in_range:
          - 0.0
          - 100.0
  acme.policies.Latency:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Maximum tolerated network latency.
    properties:
      max_latency:
        type: scalar-unit.time
        required: true
        constraints:
        - greater_than: 0 ms
  acme.policies.Cost:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Root
    description: Budget constraint over a billing period.
    properties:
      max_cost:
        type: float
        required: true
      currency:
        type: string
        default: USD
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - USD
          - EUR
          - GBP
      period:
        type: string
        default: monthly
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - hourly
          - daily
          - monthly
          - yearly
topology_template:
  node_templates:
    compute_node:
      type: Compute
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: compute_node
            num_cpus: 4
            mem_size: 8 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: linux
            distribution: Ubuntu
            version: 22.04.0
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 10
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: tcp
            secure: false
    web_server:
      type: WebServer
      requirements:
      - host: compute_node
    web_application:
      type: WebApplication
      capabilities:
        app_endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: http
            secure: false
      requirements:
      - host: web_server
    load_balancer:
      type: LoadBalancer
      properties:
        algorithm: layer7
      capabilities:
        client:
          properties:
            protocol: http
            secure: false
            floating: true
      requirements:
      - application: web_application
  policies:
  - placement_policy:
      type: acme.policies.Placement
      targets:
      - compute_node
      properties:
        locations:
        - region: us-east-1
